prompt: Transform the background into a galaxy or alien planet scene, guided by the depth map.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the background – specifically the cityscape, the body of water on the right, and the distant sky – into a scene depicting either a vibrant galaxy or a mysterious alien planet. Ensure the new background accurately follows the depth and structure indicated by image 2 (the depth map). The foreground elements, including the cars and the race track, should remain unchanged.
objects: Vibrant galaxy OR mysterious alien planet (in the background)
Body of water on the right (should not be present)
